name: Chicken & Broccoli Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until softened.
3. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Drain evaporated milk into the skillet and whisk to combine with the flour mixture.
5. Gradually stir in milk until smooth.
6. Stir in cooked mushrooms.
7. Cook and stir over medium heat until sauce thickens slightly.
8. Arrange a layer of chicken mixed with broccoli spears on top of the sauce in a 9x13 baking dish.
9. Pour remaining sauce over the chicken and broccoli mixture.
10. Top with shredded cheese.
11. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
12. Let sit before serving for an additional 15 minutes.
